I can do that — but I need one quick clarification before I create the event.

I checked your calendar for 2024-05-19:
- 10:00–11:00 — Project Kick-off (busy)
- 11:00–11:30 — One-on-One with Manager (busy)

So 10:00 is not available. Would you like me to instead schedule the one-hour follow-up at the next available slot that day (11:30–12:30)? Other possible options that day are 09:00–10:00 or any afternoon time — tell me a preferred alternate if you have one.

Also please confirm the following (or tell me any changes):
- Title: “Follow-up Meeting” (I can change this)
- Participants to invite (email addresses). If none given, I’ll create it with only your calendar.
- Location/virtual link (e.g., Office 44A, Teams/Zoom) or leave blank.
- Short description: I can use this draft — “Follow-up to discuss project progress, next steps, and action items.” — or use your text.

If you confirm (or supply the details), I’ll create the one-hour event for 2024-05-19 at the chosen time and send invites. Which option do you want?
